title: Restaurant complaint politely
subtitle: Complain without sounding rude.
overview: A2 Bridge turns short A1 sentences into connected, useful English. Read aloud, understand the Chinese, then make your own sentence.

sections.title: A2 bridge focus
rows: Excuse me, this is not what I ordered.
不好意思，这不是我点的。
Could you check the order, please?
请问你能检查一下订单吗？
What is wrong with the order?
This is not what I ordered.

items.en: Excuse me, this is not what I ordered.
items.zh: 不好意思，这不是我点的。

items.en: Could you check the order, please?
items.zh: 请问你能检查一下订单吗？

items.en: What is wrong with the order?
This is not what I ordered.
This sentence helps me speak a little longer.
items.zh: 这个句子帮助我说得稍微长一点。

items.en: I can change the details and make it true for my life.
items.zh: 我可以改变细节，让它符合我的真实生活。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: What is wrong with the order?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: This is not what I ordered.

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you add one more detail?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Could you check the order, please?
lines.zh: 请问你能检查一下订单吗？

items.en: Excuse me, this is not what I ordered.
items.zh: 不好意思，这不是我点的。

items.en: Could you check the order, please?
items.zh: 请问你能检查一下订单吗？

items.en: Now say the same idea with your own real details.
items.zh: 现在用你自己的真实细节说同一个意思。

items.en: Repeat it until it feels clear and natural.
items.zh: 重复它，直到感觉清楚又自然。
